MaxLineLength:CalendarGrid.kt$isPhaseEnd = if (isHeatmapActive) isPhaseBorderEnd else (displayPhase != null && displayPhase != nextDisplayPhase)
MaxLineLength:CalendarGrid.kt$isPhaseStart = if (isHeatmapActive) isPhaseBorderStart else (displayPhase != null && displayPhase != prevDisplayPhase)
MaxLineLength:Insight.kt$CycleLengthAverage$override val description: String = "Based on completed cycles, your average cycle length is ${averageDays.roundToInt()} days."
MaxLineLength:Insight.kt$MoodPhasePattern$val baseDescription = "You've logged a '$moodType' mood $phaseDescription in $recurrenceRate of your recent cycles."
MaxLineLength:Insight.kt$SymptomSeverityTrend$"(${String.format("%.1f", avgSeverityRecent)} vs ${String.format("%.1f", avgSeverityOlder)} in earlier cycles)."
MaxLineLength:Migration_5_6.kt$Migration_5_6$db.execSQL("INSERT INTO symptom_library (id, name, category, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?)", arrayOf(newUuid, name, "OTHER", now))

MaxLineLength:Migration_5_6.kt$Migration_5_6$db.execSQL("INSERT INTO symptom_logs (id, entry_id, symptom_id, severity, created_at) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?)", arrayOf(logId, entryId, symptomUuid, severity, now))
MaxLineLength:Migration_7_8.kt$Migration_7_8$db.query("SELECT id, flow_intensity, created_at, updated_at FROM daily_entries WHERE flow_intensity IS NOT NULL")
MaxLineLength:TutorialSeederUseCase.kt$TutorialSeederUseCase$val c1Flows = listOf(FlowIntensity.MEDIUM, FlowIntensity.HEAVY, FlowIntensity.HEAVY, FlowIntensity.MEDIUM, FlowIntensity.LIGHT)
MaxLineLength:TutorialSeederUseCase.kt$TutorialSeederUseCase$val c3Flows = listOf(FlowIntensity.MEDIUM, FlowIntensity.HEAVY, FlowIntensity.HEAVY, FlowIntensity.MEDIUM, FlowIntensity.LIGHT)
